top_signals.title: UK Finance Sees Steady Hand in Healey as New Chancellor
top_signals.summary: Britain’s financial industry welcomed John Healey’s appointment as chancellor of the exchequer, hoping the Treasury’s seventh occupant this decade will deliver stability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Berenberg alleges accounting manipulation designed to flatter profits
top_signals.summary: Auditor signs off delayed 2025 accounts, showing net profit fell from €81.6mn to €20.2mn

top_signals.title: Property taxes are poised for major midterm elections ballot battles across many U.S. states
top_signals.summary: Americans will have a rare opportunity to use votes to directly shape tax policy with 26 ballot measures on taxation across 13 states set for midterm elections.
